audit.comment: A session is flagged as likely-overkill only if it ran on an opus-tier model AND is at-or-under ALL three thresholds.

calibrate.comment: Proxy thresholds for approximating the four-axis scores from observable session data. Each axis maps a metric to a 1-3 score via [scoreTwoAt, scoreThreeAt] boundaries (score 2 at >= first value, 3 at >= second).
